title: denhamia fasciculiflora
intro: Denhamia fasciculiflora, also known as the Denham's blackwood or blackwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Denhamia fasciculiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Denhamia fasciculiflora is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be found in some herbal remedies and supplements.
